title: Puzzle Dimension
notes: Game works great. Starts in windowed mode. Switching to fullscreen in settings causes the game to lose focus. Alt-tabbing back to it makes it work correctly. Works perfectly with wired Xbox 360 controller.
Works great, no problem switching to full screen for me.
title: Puzzle Dimension
Puzzle Dimension
notes: Game works great. Starts in windowed mode. Switching to fullscreen in settings causes the game to lose focus. Alt-tabbing back to it makes it work correctly. Works perfectly with wired Xbox 360 controller.
